LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY AND TOPA INSURANCE GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE TAVERNA SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT DID NOT CREATE A POTENTIAL FOR COVERAGE. THE CLAIM AGAINST PLAINTIFF AROSE AT LEAST BY 2008 WHEN THE TAVERNAS AND MR. AYRES COMMENCED THEIR ACTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE INSURANCE POLICY'S CLAIMS MADE AND REPORTED PROVISION. THEREFORE, NO COVERAGE EXISTED. IN ADDITION, THE INVESTMENT EXCLUSION OF PARAGRAPH V(J) EXCLUDES COVERAGE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFFS LITTLEWOOD FINANCIAL GROUP and DEAN LITTLEWOOD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION -
The motion is denied. The Taverna Second Amended Complaint did not create a potential for coverage. The claim against plaintiff arose at least by 2008 when the Tavernas and Mr. Ayres commenced their action against plaintiff. Plaintiff failed to comply with the insurance policy's claims made and reported provision. Therefore, no coverage existed. In addition, the investment exclusion of paragraph V(J) excludes coverage. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/eg

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY and TOPA INSURANCE GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - The motion for summary judgment is granted. The Taverna Second Amended Complaint did not create a potential for coverage. The claim against plaintiff arose at least by 2008 when the Tavernas and Mr. Ayres commenced their action against plaintiff. Plaintiff failed to comply with the insurance policy's claims made and reported provision. Therefore, no coverage existed. In addition, the investment exclusion of paragraph V(J) excludes coverage.
(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/eg
